name: 34_Customer_Segmentation_KMeans_CustomerSegmentation_ML
query: Nahitaji kuunda mfumo wa kugawanya wateja kwa kutumia algoriti ya K-means clustering na seti ya data ya Kaggle Customer Segmentation. Anza kwa kusawazisha data katika `src/data_loader.py`, kisha tumia njia ya elbow kubaini idadi bora ya makundi na uhifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`. Tekeleza algoriti ya K-means katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi vituo vya makundi katika `results/metrics/cluster_centers.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya kugawanya kwa kutumia seaborn na uhifadhi mchoro kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`. Unda dashibodi ya Dash inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" inatumika, ikijumuisha upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Njia ya elbow inatumika kubaini idadi bora ya makundi. Tafadhali hifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`.
Algoriti ya K-means clustering inatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Kugawanya kwa wateja kunaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`.
Dashibodi ya mwingiliano inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash".

preferences.criteria: Mchoro wa elbow unaonyesha wazi jinsi idadi bora ya makundi inavyobainishwa.
Mfumo unadhibiti vizuri uzinduzi na kumalizika kwa dashibodi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" inatumika, ikijumuisha upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The implementation of the K-means clustering algorithm in `src/model.py` is indicated to have been executed successfully without errors. However, there are several issues that prevent this criterion from being fully satisfied. Firstly, there is a warning about version mismatches in the `numpy` library, which could affect computational performance. Additionally, the content of `cluster_centers.txt` is a placeholder, indicating that the actual cluster centers were not successfully saved or generated. These issues suggest that while the algorithm may be implemented, it is not functioning optimally or producing the expected outputs.

The content of the file is shown as `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which indicates that the actual cluster centers are not present. Instead, it contains a placeholder, suggesting that the expected data was not written to the file.

judge_stats.criteria: Kugawanya kwa wateja kunaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Although the trajectory evidence indicates that the customer segmentation plot was created and saved successfully using "seaborn" without any reported errors, the content of the file `customer_segmentation.png` shows an error related to an unsupported image format. This suggests that there is an issue with the image file itself, preventing it from being read or displayed correctly. Therefore, the requirement for the customer segmentation to be shown using "seaborn" and saved as `customer_segmentation.png` is not fully met due to the image file error.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya mwingiliano inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash".

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The evidence provided does not demonstrate the creation of an interactive dashboard using Dash for exploring segments interactively. While there is a mention of "app.py" being executed with Dash and no errors reported, there is no specific evidence or code provided that shows the implementation of an interactive dashboard for customer segmentation. Additionally, the issues with image files and the lack of detailed implementation in the provided code snippets (e.g., `data_loader.py` and `model.py`) further indicate that the requirement for an interactive dashboard is not fully met.
